query:
-- Ver os 6 ativos com score entre 0.90 e 0.95
SELECT codigoCetip, emissor, rating, indexador, scoreMatch, tipoMatch, ntnbVencimento
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE dataReferencia = (SELECT MAX(dataReferencia) FROM spread_analysis)
  AND scoreMatch >= 0.90 AND scoreMatch < 0.95
ORDER BY scoreMatch;
